tagline: Family-owned Santa Rosa general contractor since 1983
seoDescription: Comet Construction, Inc. is a family-owned Santa Rosa general contractor since 1983 for kitchen and bath remodels, home additions, and whole-house renovations. CA Lic. #414519.
heroHeading: Kitchens, baths, and additions built to last in Sonoma County
heroSubheading: A family-owned Santa Rosa general contractor remodeling North Bay homes since 1983, holding California general building license #414519.
highlights: Licensed CA general building contractor (Lic. #414519, Class B)
Specializing in kitchens, baths, and home additions
Serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County
aboutBody: Comet Construction, Inc. has been a family-owned and operated general contractor in Santa Rosa since 1983, remodeling kitchens, baths, and homes across Sonoma County. The company holds California general building contractor license #414519 (Class B) and works from its shop at 3011 Manning Court in Santa Rosa.

Over more than four decades, Comet Construction has focused on residential remodeling and additions — coordinating the trades, managing change orders in writing, and keeping projects on schedule and on budget. The company is a member of the Redwood Empire Remodelers Association and the North Coast Builders Exchange.

services.title: Kitchen Remodeling
services.description: Full kitchen renovations — cabinetry, counters, layout changes, and finishes — managed start to finish for Sonoma County homes.

services.title: Bathroom Remodeling
services.description: Bathroom updates and full remodels, from refreshed fixtures and tile to reconfigured layouts.

services.title: Home Additions
services.description: Room additions and expansions that add living space while matching the look and structure of your existing home.

services.title: General Remodeling
services.description: Whole-house and multi-room remodels for single-family homes, coordinating all of the specialized trades under one contractor.

services.title: Home Renovations
services.description: Renovations and improvements for established Sonoma County homes, with change orders written up and signed to avoid billing surprises.

services.title: New Construction
services.description: Single-family residential building backed by a California Class B general building license.

notes: VERIFIED FACTS (this is the Santa Rosa, CA company at 3011 Manning Ct, 95403, phone 707-578-4506). CSLB: License #414519, classification B (General Building), established 1983, $15,000 bond with American Contractors Indemnity Company, license active with expiration 8/31/2026 (per CSLB data surfaced in search; cslb.ca.gov license-detail page returned HTTP 403 to direct fetch but the number, class, 1983 date, and bond were corroborated across multiple sources). DISAMBIGUATION: confirmed Santa Rosa company via matching address (3011 Manning Ct, also a related address 1312 Crestview Ct, Santa Rosa) and phone. OWNERSHIP: family-owned; CSLB/permit records associate Carl Eugene Portscheller (President) and Debbie Lee Portscheller, with Thad & Amber Mazzoni also listed as company contacts (some directories show alt phone 707-495-0413 and thad@cometconstructioninc.com). Owner left blank in _lead to avoid asserting a single name. SERVICES: 'General Remodeling, Kitchens, Baths & Additions' and 'Single-family Houses' per RERA and directory listings — these are real. New Construction inferred from Class B license; framed conservatively. MEMBERSHIPS: Redwood Empire Remodelers Association (rera.com/cometconstruction) and North Coast Builders Exchange (ncbeonline.com) — both list the company. HOURS: Mon-Fri 7am-5pm, closed weekends per directory listings. BuildZoom score 105 (top 8% of CA contractors), ~23 permitted projects in 3 years (BuildZoom; not used as a hard claim since page was 403). TESTIMONIALS: An Angi summary referenced positive reviews (a 9-week kitchen remodel finished on time/on budget; written/signed change orders), but I could not retrieve a directly attributed verbatim quote from a verifiable source, so testimonials left EMPTY rather than risk a fabricated quote. PHOTOS: official website cometconstructioninc.com is DEAD; web.archive.org was not fetchable in this environment; no clearly-theirs direct image URLs found, so realPhotoUrls is empty. Facebook page exists (facebook.com/CometConstructionInc) and may hold real project photos for manual review. Email per lead: cometconstruction@sbcglobal.net.
